verified_flows.evidence: ce-list-page.png — page renders with PRIME PCO and PRIME PCO TITLE columns
ce-row-selected.png — '1 item selected', Add to dropdown, Send RFQ button all appear
ce-add-to-dropdown.png — Commitment (disabled), Commitment CO, Prime Contract PCO all visible
ce-add-to-pco-dialog.png — dialog loads with radio list of prime contracts from /api/projects/67/contracts
ce-ui-pco-created.png — '1 PCO created successfully' toast, PCO record created in prime_contract_change_orders
ce-pco-tab.png — tab renders PCO-1707 linked to 'Test Prime Contract - 4 Line Items' with status draft
All 6 tabs render: General, Prime Contract Change Orders, Related Items, Comments, Emails, Change History

resolved_this_run.title: Add to Prime Contract PCO — full workflow
resolved_this_run.resolution: Created AddToPrimePCODialog, ChangeEventSelectionBar wiring, add-to-pco API route, ChangeEventPrimeContractCOsTab, prime-contract-change-orders API route, detail page tab

resolved_this_run.title: Attachment key mismatch in new/page.tsx
resolved_this_run.resolution: Confirmed NOT a bug — route.ts accepts both 'file' and 'files' keys

resolved_this_run.title: prime_contract_change_orders sequence out of sync
resolved_this_run.resolution: Reset via setval() to MAX(id)+1 = 1707. Sequence was behind due to bulk-seeded records.

remaining_items.title: related_type enum: 'prime_contract_pco', 'commitment_co', 'commitment' not in RELATED_ITEM_TYPES constant
remaining_items.notes: DB accepts any string (related_type is varchar). Only the UI constant in related-items/route.ts needs updating. Non-blocking for Add To flow which uses a separate endpoint.

remaining_items.title: Column groups (Revenue / Cost spanning headers) not implemented
remaining_items.notes: Procore shows grouped column headers. DataTable does not support spanning headers. Medium effort — UI parity gap only, data is correct.

remaining_items.title: ChangeEventApprovalWorkflow component not mounted on detail page
remaining_items.notes: Component exists, not wired to General tab. Low risk — approval flow works via status transitions.

remaining_items.title: Revenue/Cost filter groups missing from filter panel
remaining_items.notes: Filter panel exists but lacks Revenue/Cost group filters matching Procore's UI.

remaining_items.title: lineItemRevenueSource enum values may differ from Procore
remaining_items.notes: Enum mapping not confirmed against current Procore values. Low risk — field is optional.

waivers.title: Column groups (Revenue/Cost spanning headers)
waivers.waiver_reason: DataTable component architecture does not support spanning headers without significant refactor. Deferred to DataTable v2 sprint.
